ogTitle: Mepunga East vs Mepunga West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mepunga East and Mepunga West.
heading: Mepunga East vs Mepunga West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mepunga East, Victoria and Mepunga West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mepunga East has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mepunga West (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mepunga East or Mepunga West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mepunga East has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Mepunga West scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mepunga East scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Mepunga West scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mepunga East or Mepunga West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mepunga East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
